title: North American Clean Fuels Market: Month-in-Review August 2024
content:
Key Highlights

Canada CFR
  • Canada CFR Price was around C$166.25 for CC2 credits and C$160 for CC3 credits in August.
  CA LCFS
  • On August 12th, CARB issued a â€˜Notice of Public Availability of Modified Textâ€™ regarding the Low Carbon Fuel Standard Amendments. The public comment period ended on August 27, 2024.
  • In August, credit trading volumes dropped significantly to 1.19M, a 77.16% decrease from Julyâ€™s 5.21M credits.
  BC LCFS
  • BC LCFS monthly trading witnessed a more than 90% decline MoM and is nowhere closer to the March peak.
  • Average credit price dropped by 54.22% MoM to reach $151.01/MT.
  OR CFP
  • In July, OR CFP average credit prices declined by 28.70% compared to June, falling significantly below the $100 mark.
  • Trading activity in July rose by 4.4x times as 268.85k credits were transferred.
  WA CFS
  • Average credit prices in WA CFS decreased by 21.02% MoM.
  • For July, 112,901 credits were traded in 19 transfers at an average price of $32.21/MT, with a transaction value of $3.47M.
  US RFS
  • In July, D3 and D5 RIN Prices increased while D4 Prices decreased.Â  RIN Generation increased, while transaction volumes of RINs declined 15.49% MoM.
author: Mansift Kaur
